series_metadata.series_title: BSI - SL Examination Report Work Papers
series_metadata.series_description: These records contain examiner work papers, work sheets, bank policies, check sheets, and examination programs relating to examinations of each savings and loan association regulated by the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions under Chapters 1151., 1153., 1155., and 1157. of the Ohio Revised Code. These records also contain related examination report correspondence regarding directives issued by the Division.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: records in operating area next examination
